ddls:
CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "show_name" TEXT /* Name of the show */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Opening date of the show */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Closing date of the show (if applicable) */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater where the show is performed */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Category or genre of the show */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Length of the show in minutes */,
  "intermission" INTEGER /* Whether the show has an intermission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weekly_financials" (
  "financial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial record */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show the financial data belongs to */,
  "week_ending" TEXT /* Date the week ends */,
  "gross" REAL /* Gross earnings for the week */,
  "gross_potential" REAL /* Gross potential for the week (percentage) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the week */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Capacity for the week (percentage) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the financial data belongs to */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season the financial data belongs to */,
  "revenue_streams" TEXT /* Additional revenue streams */,
  "expenses" REAL /* Total expenses for the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("financial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weekly_financials_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show the performance belongs to */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "preview" INTEGER /* Whether the performance is a preview (true) or not (false) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the performance */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the performance */,
  "attendance_percentage" REAL /* Attendance percentage for the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, financial analyst, marketing) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Specific action performed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket sale */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show the ticket sale belongs to */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the ticket sale */,
  "ticket_price" REAL /* Price of the ticket */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of tickets sold */,
  "ticket_type" TEXT /* Type of ticket sold */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer who purchased the tickets */,
  "customer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer who purchased the tickets */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_sales_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theaters" (
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theater */,
  "theater_name" TEXT /* Name of the theater */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the theater */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the theater */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the theater owner */,
  "contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the theater */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theater_id")
)
